integration_contract.execution_resource_authority: Attempt + Worker + host-scoped ResourceLease + resource telemetry
integration_contract.promotion_rule: Only reproducible B_dev improvement plus independent B_test and valid approval may promote
integration_contract.no_effect_rule: NO_EFFECT never creates CandidateSnapshot or Champion

runtime_only_rule.result: PASS when execution completed and runtime evidence is valid
runtime_only_rule.formal_readiness_status: blocked until an auditable frozen Git source is available

required_gates: fresh ML/DL classification/regression/clustering and failure-injection replay
GPU leases active=0 after all terminal Attempts
